projects.title: E-Commerce Customer Churn Prediction | Supervised Learning | Classification
projects.description:  Built an XGBoost classifier to predict customer churn with 92.09% accuracy using Python and scikit-learn.  Performed feature engineering, missing value treatment, and GridSearchCV-based hyperparameter tuning.  Evaluated model with Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and F1-Score to optimize for business-critical false-negative reduction.  Deployed as an interactive Streamlit web app with real-time prediction

projects.title: Brain Tumor Detection using CNN | Deep Learning | Image Classification
projects.description:  Developed a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to classify MRI brain scans as tumor-positive or tumor-negative using TensorFlow and Keras.  Applied image preprocessing, data augmentation, and transfer learning by using cnn architecture MobileNetV2 to improve model generalization and robustness.  Evaluated model performance using Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and F1-Score; achieved high classification accuracy on the test dataset.  Built an end-to-end inference pipeline deployable via a Streamlit web application for real-time predictions.

projects.title: Titanic Survival Prediction | Supervised Learning | Classification
projects.description: Developed a binary classification model using XGBoost with feature engineering and hyperparameter tuning, achieving 80.09% accuracy on test data and deployed as an interactive Streamlit web app with real-time prediction

projects.title: Credit Card Customer Segmentation | Unsupervised Learning | Clustering
projects.description:  Segmented customers using KMeans Clustering and PCA for dimensionality reduction; visualized cluster profiles with Matplotlib and Seaborn to derive actionable insights.
